description: Append-only JSONL of UCC operator authentication events. Synced daily by .github/workflows/ucc-audit-log-sync.yml from a Vercel Blob populated by fitme-story/src/app/api/cron/sync-audit-log/route.ts. Live source is fitme-story/.local/ucc-auth-events.jsonl on the Vercel function host. Privacy: never log raw credential_id (sha256:hash only), full IP (ipv4 truncated to /24), full user_agent (family only). Schema: timestamp, event_type, schema_version, credential_id_hash, operator_label, ip_class, user_agent_family, outcome, reason, session_id_hash, rp_id, duration_ms, plus per-event-type extras (device_type, mediation, session_ttl_seconds, revoked_self, etc.).
